title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
